fields.label: filename
fields.description: Local path to output file (if any).

fields.label: filter pcap name
fields.description: When I(category=filter-pcap), this value can be a blank string, or a packet capture name.  If the value is blank, a list of packet capture files will be returned.  If the value is a packet capture file name, the file will be written to I(filename).

fields.description: B(Deprecated) Use I(provider) to specify PAN-OS connectivity instead. HORIZONTALLINE The IP address or hostname of the PAN-OS device being configured.

fields.label: threat pcap id
fields.description: When I(category=threat-pcap), this value is a unique identifier for the packet capture, and can be obtained from the 'pcap_id' field in the THREAT log.

fields.label: threat pcap search time
fields.description: When I(category=threat-pcap), this value is is used to narrow the search for the 'pcap_id' and is used to set a time window in the range -5 minutes to +2 hours of the time specified. The search time is typically set to the **receive_time** field in the THREAT log. The PAN-OS log time string format is used, for example '2015/01/20 10:51:09'.  If the value is not specified, it will be set to the threat epoch time which is part of the 'pcap_id'.

fields.label: threat pcap serial
fields.description: When I(category=threat-pcap), this value is required when exporting from Panorama and is used to specify the device to fetch the packet capture from.
